title: %Error: test_regress/t/t_gen_for1.v:62:15: Can't find definition of 'init' in dotted task/function: 'fnxtclk1.init'
body:
Thanks for taking the time to report this.

Can you please attach an example that shows the issue or missing feature?  (Must be openly licensed, completely self-contained so can directly run what you provide. Ideally use test_regress format, see https://veripool.org/guide/latest/contributing.html?highlight=test_regress#reporting-bugs)

```
git diff
diff --git a/test_regress/t/t_gen_for1.v b/test_regress/t/t_gen_for1.v
index 599cd55e1..364b03f51 100644
--- a/test_regress/t/t_gen_for1.v
+++ b/test_regress/t/t_gen_for1.v
@@ -57,6 +57,10 @@ module Testit (clk, reset, b);
             .reset(reset),
             .clk(clk),
             .w(d[i]) );
+
+        initial begin
+           fnxtclk1.init();
+        end
       end
    endgenerate
 
@@ -81,4 +85,8 @@ module fnxtclk (u, reset, clk, w );
       end
    end
 
+   task init;
+      $display("%m");
+   endtask // init
+
 endmodule
```

What output from that test indicates it is wrong, and what is the correct or expected output?  (Or, please make test self-checking if possible.)

```
./bin/verilator --binary test_regress/t/t_gen_for1.v
%Error: test_regress/t/t_gen_for1.v:62:15: Can't find definition of 'init' in dotted task/function: 'fnxtclk1.init'
   62 |      fnxtclk1.init();
      |               ^~~~
        ... Known scopes under 'init': <no instances found>
```

VCS:

```
vcs -q -full64 +vcs+lic+wait -sverilog test_regress/t/t_gen_for1.v
../simv up to date

./simv
t.testit.fnxtclk1[0].fnxtclk1.init
```

What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?

```
./bin/verilator --binary test_regress/t/t_gen_for1.v
```

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?  Did you try it with other simulators?

```
Verilator 5.043 devel rev v5.042-25-g9d7498416
```

What OS and distribution are you using?

```
Linux 4.18.0-553.51.1.el8_10.x86_64
```

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?

(Please avoid attaching screenshots that show text - you can convert images to text using e.g. https://ocr.space)

             .reset(reset),
             .clk(clk),
             .w(d[i]) );

+        end
       end
    endgenerate

       end
